text:
Nicole Wang
Nicole Wang is an Assistant Professor of Practice in Interactive Media Business (IMB) at NYU Shanghai and a CFA Charterholder. Professor Wang has extensive working experience in the financial and marketing industries in Europe. Prior to joining NYU Shanghai, she was an investment portfolio manager for institutional clients in Europe.
Actively engaged in entrepreneurship within new media and tech, she is a social media content creator and an independent product manager. Her focus lies in developing immersive and efficient tools that align with our natural learning habits through innovative UX design for AI web apps.
Learn more about the ongoing projects at https://tangerings.github.io/.
